  'summary': 'As the global markets navigate a mixed landscape marked by '

 {'date': '2026-01-09 09:38:38',

  'summary': 'As global markets navigate a complex landscape marked by '

  'summary': 'As global markets navigate the final weeks of 2025, investor '
